executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_new repository (main branch) - Attempt 2. Critical workflow dispatch configuration error preventing GitHub Actions from executing. HTTP 500 Internal Server Error indicates server-side issue with workflow dispatch endpoint.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow Dispatch Failure
errors.description: Failed to dispatch workflow due to HTTP 500 Internal Server Error from GitHub API
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_new/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Failed to run workflow dispatch","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"500"}
errors.root_cause: GitHub Actions API returned 500 error when attempting to dispatch workflow. This could be due to: 1) Workflow file syntax errors, 2) Missing or invalid workflow_dispatch trigger, 3) GitHub API temporary outage, 4) Repository permissions issues, 5) Workflow file path encoding issues
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage - no builds can be triggered via API

steps: 1. Validate .github/workflows/build.yml syntax using GitHub Actions schema
2. Ensure workflow_dispatch trigger is properly configured in the workflow file
3. Verify repository has Actions enabled in settings
4. Check workflow file permissions and encoding
5. Add error handling and retry logic with exponential backoff
6. Implement workflow dispatch validation before API call
automated_fix.code_fix:
# Recommended workflow_dispatch configuration:

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      source_folder:
        description: 'Source folder to build'
        required: false
        default: 'code'
        type: string

# Add validation job:
jobs:
  validate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Validate inputs
        run: |
          echo "Validating workflow dispatch inputs"
          echo "Source folder: ${{ github.event.inputs.source_folder }}"
automated_fix.compliance_notes: Fix follows GitHub Actions best practices. Implements input validation and error handling per enterprise DevOps standards.

recommended_actions: IMMEDIATE: Verify .github/workflows/build.yml exists and has valid YAML syntax
IMMEDIATE: Check GitHub Actions is enabled for repository
SHORT-TERM: Add workflow_dispatch trigger if missing
SHORT-TERM: Implement retry mechanism with exponential backoff for API calls
LONG-TERM: Set up monitoring for GitHub Actions API health
LONG-TERM: Implement circuit breaker pattern for external API calls
prevention_measures: Pre-commit hooks to validate workflow YAML syntax
Automated workflow file testing in CI/CD pipeline
GitHub Actions API health monitoring and alerting
Fallback mechanisms for workflow dispatch failures

findings: Workflow dispatch mechanism not functioning - impacts deployment pipeline compliance
No automated retry mechanism detected - violates resilience requirements
Missing error handling in workflow dispatch - needs improvement per DevOps standards
recommendations: Implement robust error handling and retry logic
Add monitoring and alerting for workflow dispatch failures
Document workflow dispatch configuration in runbook

next_steps: 3. Check repository Actions settings and permissions
4. Implement recommended fixes from automated_fix section
5. Test workflow dispatch with corrected configuration
